message:
Command `MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
echo "=== Launching final clean run ==="
echo "wrapper.v: patched (no amuxbus inout ports)"
echo "compute_ss.v: restored from git (blank line 313)"
echo "Start: $(date)"
echo ""

cd "$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

nohup librelane \
  --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
  --pdk sky130A \
  --run-tag wrapper_run \
  --overwrite \
  --design-dir . \
  config.json \
  > /tmp/librelane_final.log 2>&1 &

FINAL_PID=$!
echo "LibreLane PID: $FINAL_PID"
echo "Log: /tmp/librelane_final.log"

sleep 10
ps -p $FINAL_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "RUNNING" || echo "FAILED"
echo ""
tail -5 /tmp/librelane_final.log` executed with exit code 0.
